context: Tests whether the agent identifies and removes all harness-specific tool references (Cursor @codebase/@workspace, Claude Code /compact, opencode model switch) and replaces them with universal tools (Read, Edit, Bash, Grep, Glob). A naive agent might miss the anti-patterns section or leave some references.

checklist.name: Cursor references flagged
checklist.description: compliance-report.md identifies the Cursor-specific references (@codebase and/or @workspace) as compatibility violations

checklist.name: Claude Code reference flagged
checklist.description: compliance-report.md identifies the Claude Code-specific reference (/compact command) as a compatibility violation

checklist.name: opencode reference flagged
checklist.description: compliance-report.md identifies the opencode-specific command (model switch) as a compatibility violation

checklist.name: Harness refs removed from fixed skill
checklist.description: SKILL-fixed.md does NOT contain any of: @codebase, @workspace, /compact, 'opencode model switch', 'Cursor', 'Claude Code'

checklist.name: Universal tools in workflow
checklist.description: SKILL-fixed.md workflow uses only universal tools (Read, Edit, Bash, Grep, Glob) — no agent-specific commands

checklist.name: Anti-patterns section cleaned
checklist.description: SKILL-fixed.md anti-patterns section does not contain any harness-specific tool references
